families.name: Access Control
families.abstract: Account provisioning/deprovisioning, role/privilege assignment and review, least privilege, session/lock/logout, MFA/remote/wireless/mobile access, info-flow and DAC/MAC/ABAC enforcement

families.name: Awareness and Training
families.abstract: Security/privacy awareness, literacy and role-based training; phishing/social‑engineering, insider‑threat, APT and cyber‑threat exercises; training records, updates, and feedback.

families.name: Audit and Accountability
families.abstract: System and application event logging, audit record content/retention, time stamps, centralized collection/correlation, log protection/transfer, real-time alerts and audit review/reporting.

families.name: Assessment, Authorization, and Monitoring
families.abstract: System-level control assessments, independent assessors, continuous monitoring, control assessment plans/reports, POA&Ms, system authorization/authorizing official, penetration/red-team testing

families.name: Configuration Management
families.abstract: Baseline configurations, CMDB/inventory, change control/approval, automated rollout/rollback, configuration settings, hardening, software/firmware signing, least‑functionality.

families.name: Contingency Planning
families.abstract: System contingency plans, backups, alternate processing/storage/telecom sites, RTO/RPO, recovery/reconstitution, contingency testing/training, roles/contacts, plan protection and coordination.

families.name: Identification and Authentication
families.abstract: User/device/service identity proofing, account/identifier lifecycle, authenticators (passwords, MFA, biometrics, PKI, tokens, PIV), SSO, re‑auth, device attestation, token/certificate management

families.name: Incident Response
families.abstract: Incident reporting, tracking, handling, containment, eradication, recovery; IR plans, playbooks, table‑tops/simulations, SOCs, CSIRT teams, forensics, automated correlation and notification

families.name: Maintenance
families.abstract: Scheduling, authorizing, logging and sanitizing system maintenance (local, non‑local, field); maintenance tools, personnel authorization/escorts, spares, and records.

families.name: Media Protection
families.abstract: Controls for handling, marking, storing, transporting, restricting access to, sanitizing, downgrading, documenting, and auditing physical and digital system media and custodianship.

families.name: Physical and Environmental Protection
families.abstract: Facility physical security and environmental controls: access lists/credentials, guards/locks/vestibules, visitor logs, surveillance, power/fire/UPS, HVAC, water, EM emissions, asset tracking.

families.name: Planning
families.abstract: System-level planning artifacts: system security & privacy plans, CONOPS, security/privacy architectures, control baselines and tailoring, rules of behavior, central management of planned controls

families.name: Program Management
families.abstract: Organization-wide security & privacy program governance: program/ privacy plans, senior security/privacy officers, budgets, system inventories, POA&Ms, risk strategy, continuous monitoring.

families.name: Personnel Security
families.abstract: Position risk designations, background checks/clearances/indoctrination, onboarding/offboarding actions (access revocation, exit interviews), transfers, access agreements, external personnel controls

families.name: Personally Identifiable Information Processing and Transparency
families.abstract: PII-specific policies, authority-to-process, purpose-limitation, data tagging/automation, consent/just-in-time/revocation, privacy notices/Systems of Records notices, SSN rules, matching agreements

families.name: Risk Assessment
families.abstract: System/information security categorization; system risk assessments, supply-chain & PII privacy impact assessments; vulnerability scanning, trend analysis, threat hunting, risk response.

families.name: System and Services Acquisition
families.abstract: Acquisition and procurement of systems/services: contract language, security/privacy requirements, developer deliverables (design, code, test evidence, configs), vendor oversight, cloud/location, keys

families.name: System and Communications Protection
families.abstract: Network and boundary controls, subnetting/segmentation, firewalls/proxies, VPNs/remote access, TLS/cryptography, key management, traffic filtering, DoS mitigation, session protections

families.name: System and Information Integrity
families.abstract: Patch/patch automation, flaw remediation, AV/malware & spam protection, integrity checks (boot/code/firmware), input validation, monitoring/IDS, alerts, data de‑identification

families.name: Supply Chain Risk Management
families.abstract: Supplier vetting, contracts and flow‑downs, provenance/track‑and‑trace, anti‑counterfeit, tamper resistance/inspection, SCRM plans/teams, acquisition strategies and supplier assessments
